hooks.command: node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const o=JSON.parse(d);const f=(o.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(f.includes('frontend2.0')&&!f.endsWith('.md'))console.log('[DOC-REMINDER] '+f+' editado. Actualiza el .md segun frontend2.0/CLAUDE.md');}catch(e){}});"
